name: Sirima's Broccoli & Shrimp Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broccoli florets from their stems and separate into small clusters.
2. Peel the stems, removing strings; skin them.
3. Cut the broccoli into julienne strips.
4. Bring 2 quarts of lightly salted water to a boil.
5. Add the broccoli florets and stems and cook just until tender crisp, about 2 minutes.
6. Drain and plunge into ice water. When chilled, drain thoroughly and put in a bowl.
7. Add scallions, bell pepper, and shrimp to the bowl with broccoli.
8. To make the dressing, combine rice vinegar, sugar, salt, ginger, vegetable oil, sesame oil, and pepper in a bowl. Whisk until well blended.
9. Toss the salad mixture with the dressing and marinate for 1 to 2 hours.
10. Just before serving, sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
